ORDER GRANTING CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT

THE CCSF MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT GRANTED,NO TRIABLE ISSUE OF MATERIAL FACT AS TO WHETHER THE CCF HAD EITHER ACTUAL OR CONSTRUCTIVE NOTICE OF THE DANGEROUS CONDITION ALLEGED TO HAVE CAUSED PLAITNIFF'S INJURIES. IT IS FURTHER ORDERED THAT DEFENDANT CCSF SHALL RECOVER STATUTORY COSTS OF SUIT.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT DEFENDANT CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO RECOVER FROM PLAINTIFF WHELAN, WILLIAM R JUDGMENT IS HEREBY ENTERED IN FAVOR OF DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO.DEFENDANTS ARE ENTITLED TO RECOVER THEIR COSTS AS PROVIDED BY LAW.
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT FILED BY DEFT CCSF
ARBITRATION ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF AUG-21-2003 IS OFF CALENDAR - JUDGMENT FILED. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITH PREJUDICE
